pilot_config.quality_note: Pilot sample size >= 100 required for reliable signal. All pilots use seed=42. This is iteration 9 (full mode), so most pilots are fast sanity checks since iter_008 pilot already validated feasibility.

pilot_tasks.description: Quick re-verification that iter_008 environment is still functional. All dependencies confirmed in iter_008 pilot.
pilot_tasks.pass_criteria: SAELens, TransformerLens, GPU, Gemma 2B, RAVEL, sae_spelling all importable and loadable.
pilot_tasks.fail_action: If any dependency broke: reinstall via pip. If Gemma 2B not loadable: check unsloth cache.

pilot_tasks.description: MOST CRITICAL PILOT: Train probes at layers 12 and 18 for city-continent (best pilot F1=0.83) and first-letter. Verify that layer 18 improves over layer 12 for factual knowledge.
pilot_tasks.pass_criteria: City-continent probe F1 at layer 18 or 24 exceeds 0.85 (pilot layer 12: 0.83). First-letter via sae_spelling confirmed F1=1.0. At least one RAVEL hierarchy within 0.02 of quality gate.
pilot_tasks.fail_action: If no RAVEL probe reaches 0.85 at any layer: try alternative prompt templates. If still failing: relax gate to 0.80 with documented caveat. If all layers fail: restrict paper to first-letter + activation patching.

pilot_tasks.description: Verify iter_001 threshold sensitivity JSON is parseable. This task FAILED in iter_008 -- ensure correct file path.
pilot_tasks.pass_criteria: File loads, 5x4 grid parseable, at least 1 cell interpretable.
pilot_tasks.fail_action: If file corrupted or format changed: manually inspect and adapt parser.

pilot_tasks.description: Run first-letter absorption on 4 of 8 SAE configs (L6-16k, L12-16k, L12-65k, L18-16k) to verify replication at full scale.
pilot_tasks.pass_criteria: Absorption rates in 1-50% range for >= 3/4 configs. Bootstrap CI computed. Consistent with pilot L12-16k rate of 3.9%.
pilot_tasks.fail_action: If rates near 0% or 100%: check probe normalization, SAE encoding pipeline.

pilot_tasks.description: Run activation patching on 10 words (7 pilot + 3 new) with 100 contexts each. Verify pipeline scales and new words can be identified.
pilot_tasks.pass_criteria: 10 words processed. At least 3 new words (beyond pilot 7) identified via integrated gradients. Recovery rates computed for all. Wilcoxon p computed (relaxed to p < 0.10 for pilot).
pilot_tasks.fail_action: If no new words found: use all first-letter FN tokens (not just 9 core words). If pipeline errors: adapt iter_008 code.

pilot_tasks.description: Run cross-domain absorption for the best RAVEL hierarchy at its best layer on 2 SAE configs.
pilot_tasks.pass_criteria: Absorption rate computed for 1 hierarchy x 2 SAE configs. Rate different from first-letter. Statistical comparison computable.
pilot_tasks.fail_action: If no RAVEL hierarchy passes gate: use relaxed gate (0.80) for pilot comparison with explicit caveat.

pilot_tasks.description: Verify SAEBench SAE loading and absorption measurement on first-letter with BatchTopK.
pilot_tasks.pass_criteria: BatchTopK SAE loads. Absorption rate computed. Comparable to pilot result (12.8% at L12-16k).
pilot_tasks.fail_action: If SAEBench SAEs not available: document and restrict to Gemma Scope JumpReLU comparison.

pilot_tasks.description: Run GAS on 1000 sequences (up from 200 pilot) to check if scaling improves signal.
pilot_tasks.pass_criteria: GAS computed on 1000 sequences. Spearman rho computed. Any improvement over pilot rho=0.12 noted.
pilot_tasks.fail_action: If rho still < 0.2: proceed to full 10k knowing negative result is likely. Report for appendix.

pilot_execution_strategy.total_pilot_time: ~1.5 hours with 1 GPU, ~40 minutes with 4 GPUs

go_no_go_gates.fallback: Relax gate to 0.80 or restrict to first-letter + activation patching
Use all FN tokens, not just named core words
